mapper.insert: insert into httpjob_logs (ID, JOB_NAME, JOB_GROUP, REQUEST_TYPE, HTTP_URL, HTTP_PARAMS, FIRE_TIME, RESULT) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpParams, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fireTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into httpjob_details ( ID, JOB_NAME, JOB_GROUP, DESCRIPTION, REQUEST_TYPE, HTTP_URL, HTTP_PARAMS, CREATE_TIME ) values ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpParams, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.select: select ID, JOB_NAME, JOB_GROUP, DESCRIPTION, REQUEST_TYPE, HTTP_URL, HTTP_PARAMS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME from HTTPJOB_DETAILS where JOB_NAME = #{jobName} and JOB_GROUP = #{jobGroup}

SELECT t.JOB_NAME, t.JOB_GROUP, hd.DESCRIPTION, hd.REQUEST_TYPE, hd.HTTP_URL, hd.HTTP_PARAMS, hd.CREATE_TIME, ct.CRON_EXPRESSION FROM QRTZ_TRIGGERS t LEFT JOIN QRTZ_CRON_TRIGGERS ct ON ( t.TRIGGER_NAME = ct.TRIGGER_NAME AND t.TRIGGER_GROUP = ct.TRIGGER_GROUP ) LEFT JOIN HTTPJOB_DETAILS hd ON ( t.JOB_NAME = hd.JOB_NAME AND t.JOB_GROUP = hd.JOB_GROUP ) WHERE 1=1
AND ( t.JOB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{jobName} || '%' OR t.JOB_GROUP LIKE '%' || #{jobName} || '%' )
ORDER BY hd.ID DESC

SELECT hd.JOB_NAME, hd.JOB_GROUP, hd.DESCRIPTION, hd.REQUEST_TYPE, hd.HTTP_URL, hd.HTTP_PARAMS, hd.CREATE_TIME FROM HTTPJOB_DETAILS hd LEFT JOIN QRTZ_TRIGGERS qt ON ( hd.JOB_NAME = qt.JOB_NAME AND hd.JOB_GROUP = qt.JOB_GROUP ) WHERE (qt.JOB_NAME IS NULL AND qt.JOB_GROUP IS NULL)
AND ( hd.JOB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{jobName} || '%' OR hd.JOB_GROUP LIKE '%' || #{jobName} || '%' )
ORDER BY hd.ID DESC
